author: gb9t
content: Iter 129 result: net/bridge/br_fdb.md (Linux bridge forwarding-database - br_fdb.c ~1639 lines; per-(MAC, VID) BridgeFdbEntry rhashtable + br_fdb_update src-MAC learning at RX + br_fdb_find_rcu fast-path lookup + per-port dst tracking with MAC mobility + per-static + per-local + per-sticky + per-offloaded flags + ageing_time 300s default with delayed_work gc-walker + br_fdb_age_out + bridge fdb netlink ABI RTM_NEWNEIGH/DELNEIGH/GETNEIGH + br_fdb_external_learn_add for switchdev + br_fdb_test_addr is-local check + per-VLAN-aware vid in lookup-key + fdb_max_learned cap MAC-flood DoS) + mm/memcg.md (Memory cgroup - memcontrol.c ~5958 lines; per-memcg 4 page_counters memory/memsw/kmem/swap + try_charge walks ancestor hierarchy with reclaim-retry-then-OOM + cgroup-v2 memory.{min, low, high, max, peak, current, swap.*, kmem.*, events, stat} + memory.protected hierarchy: PROTECTED_NONE/LOW/MIN + memory.high PSI throttling + per-memcg-OOM scoped to subtree + mem_cgroup_per_node lruvec + lru_lock per-(node, memcg) + obj_cgroup for slab attribution with reparent-on-die + per-memcg.id u16 unique for swap-cache + folio_set_memcg/folio_memcg). 208 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/bridge/br_stp.md (STP/RSTP) + mm/thp.md (transparent hugepages).
